title: Remove invite code from teacher registration

requirements.text: Remove the invite code field and its validation logic from the teacher registration flow. The registration form on the login page should no longer display a 'Registration/Invite Code' input field. The AuthContext must no longer require or validate an invite code when registering a new teacher — any new teacher can register by providing only their Display Name, Username, and Password.

quotes: remove the invite code option in the code

acceptanceCriteria: The teacher registration form does not contain an invite code input field.
Submitting the registration form with only Display Name, Username, and Password successfully creates a new teacher account.
No invite code validation logic remains in AuthContext.tsx or LoginPage.tsx.
Existing demo accounts (teacher/class1 and principal/admin) continue to work after the change.
Previously registered teachers stored in localStorage are still able to log in.
No error messages referencing an invite code appear anywhere in the UI.

constraints: Do not modify any files listed under frontend.immutablePaths.
Do not alter the existing demo account credentials or session logic.
Do not remove the 'Register as Teacher' option itself — only remove the invite code field and its validation.
nonGoals: Adding any new registration fields or steps.
Implementing email verification or any other gating mechanism to replace the invite code.
Changing the login flow for existing users.
Backend changes — all auth logic remains in localStorage/frontend only.
